zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana Keith於1358年出生在蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔時，她的父親William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine43歲，母親Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie11355歲。她於1363年3月與John Hay在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1435年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christiana Keith于1358年出生在苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔时，她的父亲William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine43岁，母亲Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie11355岁。她于1363年3月与John Hay在英国苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1435年在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana Keith was born in 1358, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, her father, William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine, was 43 and her mother, Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie, was 11355. She married John Hay in March 1363, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1435, in Haddington, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana Keith est née en 1358, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, son père, William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie, avait 11355 ans. Elle a épousé John Hay en mars 1363, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1435, à Haddington, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christiana Keith 1358 in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine 43 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie 11355. Sie hat im März 1363 in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom John Hay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1435 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Haddington, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana Keith è nata il nel 1358 nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, sua padre, William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie, aveva 11355 anni. Lei sposato John Hay nel marzo 1363, nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1435, nel Haddington, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christiana Keithが1358年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルで生まれた時，父William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardineは43歳，母Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowieは11355歳であった。1363年3月にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルでJohn Hayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1435年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンハッドイントンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana Keith(이)가 1358년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie(은)는 11355세였다. 그녀는 1363년 3월 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 John Hay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 하딩턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana Keith nasceu em 1358, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie, tinha 11355 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hay em março de 1363, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1435, em Haddington, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana Keith родилась в 1358 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie, 11355. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hay марта 1363 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1435 г. в местности хаддингтон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christiana Keith nació en 1358, en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, su papá, William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie, tenía 11355 años. Se casó con John Hay en marzo de 1363, en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1435, en Haddington, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
